name: clara-maren-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Maren, Maren handling a scheduling scenario, and Maren returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Scheduling scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, I need to reshuffle appointments across Berlin and Potsdam after two cancellations tomorrow afternoon.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
